---
title: "Were the 2023 Padres Bad or Unlucky?"
author: "Andrew Cho"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

## read data
# obtained via https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/mattop/san-diego-padres-batting-and-pitching-1969-2023?resource=download

```{r}
hitters <- read_csv("/Users/andrewcho/Documents/personal/SDP_batting.csv")
```
## filter to only 2023
```{r}
hitters2023 <- hitters |>
  dplyr::filter(Year == 2023)
```

```{r}
